expectations.text: Diagnoses the cause as a transformers version mismatch (transformers 5.x missing the attribute that vLLM still calls)
Provides the fix: add an upper bound on transformers (e.g., transformers<4.56 or specific 4.x version)
expectations.evidence: matched: no transformers upper-bound pin found

expectations.text: Shows corrected pip_install code with the transformers pin
Explains WHY this happens (open upper bound in vllm's setup.py letting pip resolve to incompatible major) so the user can solve similar future issues
expectations.evidence: no explanation of WHY this happens

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend downgrading vLLM as the primary fix (the user is on a known-good vLLM; transformers is the actual problem)
